    Methods in de.uka.ilkd.key.settings that return GoalChooser
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    GoalChooser<Proof,Goal>
    StrategySettings.getCustomApplyStrategyGoalChooser()
    Returns the customized GoalChooser which is used in an ApplyStrategy instance to select the next Goal to apply a rule on.

    Method
    Description
    void
    StrategySettings.setCustomApplyStrategyGoalChooser(GoalChooser<Proof,Goal> customGoalChooser)
    Sets the customized GoalChooser which is used in an ApplyStrategy instance to select the next Goal to apply a rule on.
